tagline: Quantify every trade before you risk

steps.description: Current price field fills with a realistic asset price, setting the base for all calculations
Position size updates, scaling the expected value output proportionally
Price targets table comes into view, showing take-profit and stop-loss input rows
Take-profit target entered, probability distribution begins to auto-normalize across rows
Expected value result panel appears showing positive/negative EV, win rate, and risk-reward ratio
